dataQualityNote: Approximate replay: final scores are real ESPN historical results, Elo is rolled forward chronologically, and ESPN recent-form/stat windows are capped before each event. Rebuilt context such as injuries, standings, weather, and provider enrichment can still reflect current availability instead of the exact pregame snapshot. Exact accuracy requires saved point-in-time GameContext fixtures.
